documentation.text:
@title BasisRollup
 @notice L1 rollup contract for Basis Network zkEVM L2 with per-enterprise state chains.
 @dev Implements a three-phase commit-prove-execute lifecycle for L2 batch submissions.
      Each enterprise maintains an independent state root chain. Batches track L2 block
      ranges for bridge withdrawal references and forced inclusion verification.
      Lifecycle:
        commitBatch  -> Committed  (sequencer posts batch metadata)
        proveBatch   -> Proven     (prover submits Groth16 validity proof)
        executeBatch -> Executed   (state root finalized, L2->L1 messages processed)
      Extends the validium StateCommitment.sol (RU-V3) patterns:
        - INV-S1 ChainContinuity: prevRoot must match currentRoot before finalization
        - INV-S2 ProofBeforeState: ZK proof verified before state mutation
        - NoGap: batch IDs auto-incremented per enterprise
        - EnterpriseIsolation: per-enterprise mappings with msg.sender enforcement
      New rollup invariants:
        - INV-R1 SequentialExecution: batches executed in strict order
        - INV-R2 ProveBeforeExecute: batch must be proven before execution
        - INV-R3 CommitBeforeProve: batch must be committed before proving
        - INV-R4 MonotonicBlockRange: L2 block ranges are non-overlapping and ascending
        - INV-R5 RevertSafety: only unexecuted batches can be reverted
@dev Groth16 verifying key (same structure as StateCommitment.sol).
@dev Per-enterprise chain state. Packed into 3 storage slots.
@dev Batch data committed by the sequencer. Used to compute batchHash.
@dev Stored on-chain per batch. Uses batch hash pattern (1 slot for hash + 1 slot for packed metadata).
@notice Network admin address (Base Computing).
@notice Reference to the EnterpriseRegistry for authorization.
@dev Groth16 verifying key for the L2 state transition circuit.
@notice Whether the verifying key has been configured.
@notice Per-enterprise chain state.
@notice Per-enterprise batch info: enterprise -> batchId -> StoredBatchInfo.
@notice Global counters for all enterprises.

@notice Deploys the BasisRollup contract.
 @param _enterpriseRegistry Address of the EnterpriseRegistry contract.

@dev Verifies a Groth16 proof against the stored verifying key.
      Inline to avoid cross-contract call overhead (~56K gas saved).
      Uses EIP-196 (ecAdd, ecMul) and EIP-197 (ecPairing) precompiles.
      Virtual for test harness override.
@notice Configure the mock proof verification result.
@dev Overrides Groth16 verification with the mock result.

 @notice Minimal mock for testing BasisRollup without full EnterpriseRegistry.

a three-phase commit-prove-execute lifecycle for L2 batch submissions.      Each enterprise maintains an independent state root chain. Batches track L2 block      ranges for bridge withdrawal references and forced inclusion verification.      Lifecycle:        commitBatch  -> Committed  (sequencer posts batch metadata)        proveBatch   -> Proven     (prover submits Groth16 validity proof)        executeBatch -> Executed   (state root finalized, L2->L1 messages processed)      Extends the validium StateCommitment.sol (RU-V3) patterns:        - INV-S1 ChainContinuity: prevRoot must match currentRoot before finalization        - INV-S2 ProofBeforeState: ZK proof verified before state mutation        - NoGap: batch IDs auto-incremented per enterprise        - EnterpriseIsolation: per-enterprise mappings with msg.sender enforcement      New rollup invariants:        - INV-R1 SequentialExecution: batches executed in strict order        - INV-R2 ProveBeforeExecute: batch must be proven before execution        - INV-R3 CommitBeforeProve: batch must be committed before proving        - INV-R4 MonotonicBlockRange: L2 block ranges are non-overlapping and ascending        - INV-R5 RevertSafety: only unexecuted batches can be reverted","kind":"dev","methods":{"commitBatch((bytes32,uint64,uint64,bytes32,uint64))":{"details":"Stores keccak256(batchData) and metadata on-chain. Does not verify proofs.      INV-R4 MonotonicBlockRange: l2BlockStart must equal lastL2Block + 1 (or 1 if first batch).      NoGap: batchId is auto-incremented from totalBatchesCommitted.","params":{"data":"The batch data including state root, L2 block range, and priority ops hash."}},"constructor":{"params":{"_enterpriseRegistry":"Address of the EnterpriseRegistry contract."}},"executeBatch(uint256)":{"details":"INV-R2 ProveBeforeExecute: batch must be in Proven status.      INV-R1 SequentialExecution: batches executed in strict order.      INV-S1 ChainContinuity: verified implicitly (batches committed in order,      each batch's stateRoot was committed against the chain at commit time).","params":{"batchId":"The batch to execute (must be next sequential unexecuted batch)."}},"initializeEnterprise(address,bytes32)":{"params":{"enterprise":"The address of the enterprise to initialize.","genesisRoot":"The initial state root (hash of empty SMT)."}},"proveBatch(uint256,uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2],uint256[])":{"details":"INV-R3 CommitBeforeProve: batch must be in Committed status.      INV-S2 ProofBeforeState: proof verified before any state change.      Proves batches sequentially (totalBatchesProven must match batchId).","params":{"a":"Groth16 proof point A.","b":"Groth16 proof point B.","batchId":"The batch to prove (must be next sequential unproven batch).","c":"Groth16 proof point C.","publicSignals":"Public inputs to the state transition circuit."}},"revertBatch(address)":{"details":"INV-R5 RevertSafety: only unexecuted batches can be reverted.      Reverts from the most recently committed batch backward.      If the batch was proven, it is also unproven.","params":{"enterprise":"The enterprise whose batch to revert."}},"setVerifyingKey(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2][])":{"params":{"_IC":"The IC points of the verifying key.","_alfa1":"The alfa1 point of the verifying key.","_beta2":"The beta2 point of the verifying key.","_delta2":"The delta2 point of the verifying key.","_gamma2":"The gamma2 point of the verifying key."}}},"stateVariables":{"vk":{"details":"Groth16 verifying key for the L2 state transition circuit."}},"title":"BasisRollup","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"admin()":{"notice":"Network admin address (Base Computing)."},"commitBatch((bytes32,uint64,uint64,bytes32,uint64))":{"notice":"Commits a batch of L2 transactions. Sequencer posts batch metadata."},"constructor":{"notice":"Deploys the BasisRollup contract."},"enterpriseRegistry()":{"notice":"Reference to the EnterpriseRegistry for authorization."},"enterprises(address)":{"notice":"Per-enterprise chain state."},"executeBatch(uint256)":{"notice":"Executes a proven batch, finalizing the state root."},"getBatchCounts(address)":{"notice":"Returns the batch counts for an enterprise."},"getBatchInfo(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns the stored batch info for a specific
